alignments.candidate_evidence: Eight years at Google Devices and Services with two promotions, scaling global commercial operations and leading transformation programs; hands-on ownership of complex technical rollouts and process design
alignments.job_requirement: 5+ years of experience accountable for technical project / program delivery within Data and AI domain

alignments.candidate_evidence: Strategy and Operations / Product Operations leader with experience in technical requirements definition, UAT, rollout coordination, and multi-stakeholder transformation execution
alignments.job_requirement: Customer-facing pre-sales, technical architecture, customer success, or consulting role

alignments.candidate_evidence: Scaling global commercial operations with demonstrated ownership of complex technical programs, cross-functional coordination, and stakeholder management across multiple teams
alignments.job_requirement: Technical program or project management including account, stakeholder and resource management accountability

alignments.candidate_evidence: Google commercial operations role; experience with global stakeholder management and transformation execution, though pre-sale escalation/account executive experience not explicitly detailed
alignments.job_requirement: Experience resolving complex and important escalation with senior customer executives

alignments.candidate_evidence: Product operations and technical transformation background; limited explicit evidence of hands-on architecture depth in distributed systems, data platforms, or Spark/Databricks ecosystem
alignments.job_requirement: Understanding of solution architecture related to distributed data systems

alignments.candidate_evidence: Strategy and Operations leader focused on scaling operations and transformation; no quota or revenue target tracking mentioned
alignments.job_requirement: Track record of overachievement against quota, goals or similar objective targets

gaps.gap: No explicit production Spark, Python, or Databricks platform experience; Python is listed as basic and actively learning
gaps.mitigation: DSA role emphasizes technical credibility and communication over hands-on coding; strong technical program and architecture discussion skills can substitute. Databricks ecosystem knowledge is learnable with onboarding and mentorship from Solutions Architects and expert teams.

gaps.gap: Limited direct pre-sale or quota-carrying account growth experience; background is product operations and transformation, not classic sales or customer success account management
gaps.mitigation: Role is post-sale technical account strategy and customer enablement, not new-logo sales. Commercial skills include stakeholder leadership, roadmap strategy, and value communication, which transfer from transformation and product operations work.

gaps.gap: No explicit evidence of conducting open-ended discovery workshops or creating strategic business roadmaps with external customers; experience is internal transformation-focused
gaps.mitigation: Demonstrated stakeholder management, process design, and technical requirements definition are adjacent to discovery and roadmap skills; these are trainable through practice in a customer-facing DSA environment.

output.level_rationale: Role requires 5+ years of technical program accountability, customer-facing technical leadership, and complex stakeholder/account management, pointing to L5 senior IC. Reports to DSA Manager (not director-level), and lacks explicit manager-of-managers scope. No company stage/size provided in JD, limiting confidence slightly.".
output.summary: Strong fit for a technical program leadership and customer-facing transformation role. Candidate brings 8 years of technical program accountability, cross-functional stakeholder management, and complex rollout execution from a global commercial operations context at Google—aligning well with DSA's post-sale technical strategy and account management responsibilities. Primary gaps are lack of hands-on Spark/Databricks and explicit pre-sale customer account experience, both manageable through onboarding and mentorship in a data-platform-focused environment.
uncertainties: Company stage/size not provided; unclear if Databricks scale and product complexity match or exceed Google experience
Extent of pre-sale discovery, executive relationship-building, and customer account negotiation experience not detailed; relies on inference from commercial operations role
Depth of distributed data systems and solution architecture knowledge not explicit; candidate profile emphasizes transformation and process design over technical platform design
